notes_for_human_reviewer: Classic novice. Accepts the 71% rollup at face value, accepts M. Reyes's 6-week step-up pattern as 'on track', misses the WP-07 actuals signal (72% hours / 45% complete), misses the WP-03 spec change, misses the FCA dependency entirely, misses the infra-team dependency category. No critical-path identification. Buffer treated as 'fine' without consumption tracking. Status narrative is reassurance ('tracking well', 'confidently report', 'on track') — exactly the polite-fiction failure the chapter opens with. LinkedIn-speak in the comms suggestion ('leverage clear stakeholder messaging'). schedule_communication gets a 2 instead of 1 because the learner did produce an attempted narrative, but it softens the picture rather than reporting honestly.
